ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality where the facility is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the facility */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the facility's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the facility's location */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., park, community center) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the facility (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "transparency_level" INTEGER /* Transparency level of the facility (e.g., public, restricted) */,
  "symbol_id" TEXT /* Symbol ID for map representation */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the facility */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the facility */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the facility */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_facility_type FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type") REFERENCES facility_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "municipality_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the municipality */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the municipality */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the municipality */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the municipality in square miles */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the municipality was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the request is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of the service request (e.g., maintenance, repair) */,
  "request_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the request was completed */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the service request */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the completed service */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the user on the service provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspection_details" TEXT /* Detailed report of the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "inspector_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the inspector */,
  "inspection_cost" REAL /* Cost of the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the schedule is for */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date the schedule was created */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the maintenance task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the schedule (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the maintenance (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "last_completed_date" TEXT /* Date of the last completed maintenance */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Date of the next due maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., resident, city administrator, maintenance staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the inspector belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the inspector */,
  "last_inspection" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection conducted by the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service log */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request the log is related to */,
  "service_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service provided */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the service was completed */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who completed the service */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the service */,
  "service_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the version is for */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_versions_version_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_versions_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
